name: azure-phish
description: Minimal Azure Monitor email-phishing harness with a Firebase-hosted landing page.

scripts.setup:env: cp -n .env.example .env && echo '→ edit .env now (API_KEY, GCP_PROJECT, GCP_REGION, LANDING_URL)'
scripts.login:gcloud: gcloud auth login && gcloud auth configure-docker
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:container && npm run deploy:firebase
